title: Mi Casa - Virtual House Tour
description: Mi Casa is a fun, interactive virtual tour of my house! Explore the different rooms, and get to know more about me. The game introduces a blend of exploration, storytelling, and mini-games to keep you entertained.

body.raw:
![Welcome to my living room!](/img/mi-casa/1.png)
![Meet the characters!](/img/mi-casa/2.png)

> Mi Casa is a fun, casual way to explore a world that feels like home. It's all about creating a playful, personalized space where you can wander and enjoy mini-games designed to make you smile. Whether you’re looking for a fun escape or a chance to learn more about me through the game’s playful settings, Mi Casa is here to make your day just a little brighter! 🌟

---

## 🎮 Try the Game

- 👉 [Play Mi Casa](https://mi-casa-xi.vercel.app/)
- 💻 [View Code on GitHub](https://github.com/applescan/mi-casa)

---

## 🌟 Key Features

- 🏡 **Explore My Virtual Home** – Wander through cozy rooms filled with personality!
- 😁 **Meet Adorable Characters** – Enjoy fun, quirky interactions!
- 🎮 **Unlock Mini-Games** – Solve puzzles, collect rewards, and have fun!
- 🥳 **Charm & Surprise** – Chill, laugh, and discover hidden details throughout!

---

## ✨ Bonus Surprise!

This is just the beginning! Expect **more mini-games** and character interactions in future updates. Stay tuned!

---

## 🛠 Built With

- React
- Kaboom.js
- TypeScript
- CSS3
- HTML5
- WebGL
- Figma
- Node.js

---

## 🎥 Gameplay Video

    type="video/mp4"
    poster="/img/mi-casa/1.png"
  />

</video>
